page.introOpen: Select your pass below. Secure checkout is powered by Ticket Tailor — you'll receive a confirmation email with a QR code ticket for fast check-in at The Quay.
page.introClosed: Conference passes will go on sale here soon. Ticket types and pricing will be published when registration opens.
page.footnote: All sales are processed securely through Ticket Tailor. Need a group booking or have questions? Email events@yasalaser.com.

tiers.name: Early bird
tiers.description: Limited early-rate pass for the full Innovate program — clinical sessions, sponsor showcase, lunch, and networking reception.

tiers.name: Conference pass
tiers.description: Standard admission to Innovate 2027 — one focused day of clinical education and networking at The Quay.

tiers.name: VIP pass
tiers.description: Premium access with reserved seating and exclusive networking opportunities. Details announced at launch.
